The '''''Aelena''''' was an [[Assault Frigate Mark II/Legends|Assault Frigate Mark II]] in the service of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
